title: Change the on_delete behavior of an existing FK
prompt: An existing foreign key on :comments.post_id was created with `on_delete: :nothing`. Change it to :delete_all without losing data. Postgres requires dropping the constraint and re-adding it; Ecto's `modify :post_id, references(...)` is the approved pattern. Write a single migration at priv/repo/migrations/20260413900000_change_comments_post_id_on_delete.exs.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing the from: option on modify references. Hard because the pattern is niche.
